title: alyssum strigosum subsp. strigosum
intro: Alyssum strigosum subsp. strigosum, also known as the small-flowered alyssum, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and antispasmodic effects, making it a valuable remedy for coughs and respiratory issues. The small-flowered alyssum is also known for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, including colds, bronchitis, and digestive issues.
